description: This steel watch from maxima with classically minimalist styling and matte ionic plating for an urban edge is built with precision quartz movement for accuracy, making it as hard-wearing as it is stylish. Case diameter: 48 mm Case thickness: 11 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 1 Year Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfort Ssteele logo on the 12 hour mark Date aperture at the 3-hour mark Steel bracelet with a butterfly clasp White dial with quartz movement Screw to reset time and alarm has a cap to cover the screw Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters - wearable while washing hands and in mild rain Comes in an authentic Maxima tin case
